Clean scallions, removing outside dirty layers and rinsing thoroughly.
In a mixing bowl, season with oil and salt and pepper.
Pre-heat a plancha or similar flat cookware surface to a medium-high heat and season with a layer of oil, wiped off.
Place seasoned scallions on plancha in a single, flat layer.
Flip after ~2 mins or once they have colour.
Remove after second side has colour, reserving to a sheet tray to cool
Once cooled, cut into 3 inch lenth sections and reserve in quart containers
Store in the cooler.
